items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding data minimization in public views. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this requirement. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate various needs, but none directly support the specific scenario being tested, leading to an inconclusive status.
